g.style: box-sizing: content-box; position: absolute; left: 0px; shape-rendering: geometricprecision; pointer-events: none;

path.style: stroke: rgb(68, 68, 68); stroke-opacity: 1; fill: rgb(76, 114, 176); fill-opacity: 0.35; stroke-width: 0; opacity: 1;
stroke: rgb(68, 68, 68); stroke-opacity: 1; fill: rgb(221, 132, 82); fill-opacity: 0.35; stroke-width: 0; opacity: 1;
stroke: rgb(68, 68, 68); stroke-opacity: 1; fill: rgb(196, 78, 82); fill-opacity: 0.35; stroke-width: 0; opacity: 1;
stroke: rgb(68, 68, 68); stroke-opacity: 1; fill: rgb(129, 114, 178); fill-opacity: 0.35; stroke-width: 0; opacity: 1;
stroke: rgb(68, 68, 68); stroke-opacity: 1; fill: rgb(85, 168, 104); fill-opacity: 0.35; stroke-width: 0; opacity: 1;

rect.style: stroke-width: 0.1; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 1; fill: rgb(76, 114, 176); fill-opacity: 1;

text.style: cursor: default; font-family: 'Open Sans', verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; fill: rgb(42, 63, 95); fill-opacity: 1; text-shadow: rgb(255, 255, 255) 1px 1px 1px, rgb(255, 255, 255) -1px -1px 1px, rgb(255, 255, 255) 1px -1px 1px, rgb(255, 255, 255) -1px 1px 1px; white-space: pre;

rect.style: stroke-width: 0.1; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 1; fill: rgb(221, 132, 82); fill-opacity: 1;

text.style: font-family: 'Open Sans', verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; fill: rgb(42, 63, 95); fill-opacity: 1; white-space: pre;
